text: The new payment feature is super fast! Checkout went through in seconds.
Payment failed twice before finally going through. Not a great experience.
Love the new routing feature, my UPI payments are much smoother now.
App crashed during payment, lost my cart items. Very frustrated.
Works fine for me, no issues so far with the update.
Why is the payment page loading so slowly? It used to be instant.
Got a payment failure notification but money was deducted. Please help urgently!
Really impressed with how quickly payments go through now. 10/10.
How do I use the new smart payment thing? Feature is confusing.
Payment was declined 3 times, switched to a competitor. Bye.
I like that it automatically picks the best payment method.
App keeps freezing at the payment confirmation screen.
The update broke something, I can't complete any payment now.
Pretty smooth experience. Payment went through on first try.
Not sure what changed but it feels different. Payment still works though.
REFUND MY MONEY. Payment failed but I was charged twice!
This new routing system is genius. Way better than before.
Terrible. Payment page takes forever to load, I gave up.
Support ticket #4521 still unresolved after 2 days. Unacceptable.
I had a double charge issue but support resolved it quickly. Thanks!
The smart payment feature actually saved me time today. Nice!
Three payment failures in one day. Is the app broken?
App crashed again at checkout. This is becoming a pattern.
No issues on my end. Works just as before.
Payment was smooth today but it was slow yesterday. Inconsistent.
I was charged but order wasn't placed. Now I need a refund + support is backed up.
The routing to Razorpay is much faster! Love this update.
Starting to uninstall because payments keep failing. Not worth it.
I've had 5 failed payments this week. What is going on?
Long loading times now. What happened to the fast app?
Interesting new feature but I'm not sure it's working correctly yet.
App is unusable right now. Every payment attempt fails.
This is the worst update in the history of this app. Rollback please!
My payment works fine. Maybe it's a device-specific issue for others?
Competitor processed my payment in 2 seconds. This app took 45 and failed.
Feature works great on WiFi, terrible on mobile data for me.
I was refunded fast but I still don't trust the payment system now.
Product team should look at the crash reports. Something went very wrong.
Payments are working okay for me. Nothing special about the new feature though.
I love that the app tries different payment methods automatically!
Support queue is insane. Waited 3 hours for an agent. Unacceptable for a premium app.
My wallet was debited twice. Still waiting for resolution after 48 hours.
Okay I take it back, had a crash today too. Please fix ASAP.
App still runs fine for me. Have not encountered any payment issues.
This release has serious bugs. Payment routing to wrong gateway.
